ideation: This animation sequence simulates the whirling motion of a cyclone.  The arms will move in a circular pattern, with the left and right arms mirroring each other but slightly offset to create a sense of continuous rotation. Each frame will represent a distinct point in the circular motion.  The wrists will remain neutral to focus on the larger arm movements.  I'll use the two joints to create a fluid and expressive movement. The robot will appear as though it is mimicking the cyclone's energy through its arms.

frames.beat: arms spread wide, beginning the spin
arms sweep inward and upward, gathering energy
arms reach out and down, completing the rotation
arms pull inward and up, a tight vortex forms
